source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state of the art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualifications. We are growing revenue like crazy and looking to hire a couple founding software engineers to help us stay afloat of current customer demand and also build out systems for the future. We are very excited about the potential for AI to change the world, and work out of our SF based office.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.




THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at U Chicago and led software at PEAK6.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for founding software engineers to help us build the core systems behind Simple AI’s voice agents. You will work across product to make our agents faster, more reliable, and more capable in real production environments.

This is a high-ownership engineering role. You will ship customer-facing features, improve latency and reliability, build internal tools, debug complex edge cases, and help us scale the platform as customer demand grows.

We are a small team, so engineers here work close to the product and close to customers. You should be excited to move fast, own large parts of the system, and build technology that directly impacts revenue for businesses using Simple.



WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - 4+ years of relevant work experience.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and enthusiasm for addressing technical challenges.

 - A customer-first mindset with strong communication skills and interest in product design and prioritization.

 - Self-motivated and able to work independently.

 - Passion about learning and keeping up with latest AI advancements.

 


NICE TO HAVE

 - Previous experience with prompt engineering or working with AI/LLM-based platforms.

 - Experience as an early-stage startup engineer or founder.

 - Experience with TypeScript, React, Python, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, AWS.




IF YOU ARE EXCITED TO SHAPE THE VISUAL IDENTITY OF A FAST-GROWING AI COMPANY, WE WOULD LOVE TO CHAT.

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state of the art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualifications. We are growing revenue like crazy and looking to hire a couple founding software engineers to help us stay afloat of current customer demand and also build out systems for the future. We are very excited about the potential for AI to change the world, and work out of our SF based office.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.

 


THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at U Chicago and led software at PEAK6.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Forward Deployed Engineer to work directly with customers and help turn Simple’s voice AI platform into production-ready agents for each business.

This is a highly technical and highly customer-facing role. You will work across pre-sales and post-sales: building custom demos for prospective customers, understanding customer workflows, deploying agents, debugging edge cases, improving performance, and turning customer feedback into product improvements.

Every customer has different call flows, systems, products, policies, and edge cases. You will be responsible for understanding those details and making sure the agent works reliably in the real world. This role is a good fit for someone who wants to code, talk to customers, move fast, and be close to the business impact of what they build.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - 0-2 years of relevant work experience.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and enthusiasm for addressing technical challenges.

 - A customer-first mindset with strong communication skills and interest in product design and prioritization.

 - Self-motivated and able to work independently.

 - Passion about learning and keeping up with latest AI advancements.

 


NICE TO HAVE

 - Previous experience with prompt engineering or working with AI/LLM-based platforms.

 - Experience with TypeScript, React, Python, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, or AWS.

 


IF YOU ARE EXCITED TO WORK DIRECTLY WITH CUSTOMERS AND BUILD AI AGENTS THAT RUN IN PRODUCTION, WE WOULD LOVE TO CHAT.

source_jobs.title: Founding Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state-of-the-art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualification. We’re growing revenue like crazy and looking to bring on a founding product designer to help shape the future of our product as we scale rapidly. We are very excited about the potential for AI to change the world, and work out of our SF office 5 days a week.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.

 


THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at UChicago and led software at PEAK6.

 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - 4+ years of relevant product design experience.

 - A strong portfolio demonstrating excellent product thinking and polished interaction + visual design.

 - Experience designing complex products, workflows, or tools.

 - A customer-first mindset with exceptional communication skills.

 - Ability to operate independently in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment.

 - Curiosity and excitement about AI and the future of human-AI interaction.

 


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience at an early-stage startup or in a founding/first designer role.

 - Experience designing technical, AI, or B2B products.

 - Strong UX research skills (qualitative, customer interviews, rapid prototyping).

 - Comfort with basic front-end concepts or collaborating closely with engineers.

 - Interest in the design challenges around conversational AI, speech UX, or agent-driven interfaces.

 


IF YOU’RE EXCITED TO DEFINE THE FUTURE OF VOICE AI AND WANT TO HAVE MASSIVE OWNERSHIP IN AN EARLY-STAGE STARTUP, WE’D LOVE TO CHAT.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state-of-the-art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualification. We’re growing revenue like crazy and looking to hire a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to help accelerate outbound growth and open new markets. We are very excited about the potential for AI to change the world, and work out of our SF office.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.

 


THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at U Chicago and led software at PEAK6.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative to help build the top of our sales funnel from the ground up. You will be responsible for researching target accounts, writing outbound messages, cold calling prospects, qualifying interest, and booking meetings for the sales team.

This is a high-activity, high-learning role. You will work closely with the GTM team to test messaging, learn which buyers respond, understand different verticals, and help create the early outbound playbook for Simple.

The best fit for this role is someone who is energetic, competitive, resilient, and excited to spend a lot of time on the phone. You should be comfortable with rejection, eager to improve quickly, and motivated by the chance to break into sales at a fast-growing AI startup.

 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - 0–3 years of sales or SDR experience (early-career candidates encouraged to apply).

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills.

 - A high level of energy, resilience, and comfort with rejection.

 - Ability to stay organized and thrive in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.

 - Curiosity and genuine enthusiasm about AI and how businesses use it.

 - Self-motivated and eager to learn sales fundamentals from experienced leaders.

 


NICE TO HAVE

 - Prior SDR or outbound sales experience.

 - Experience doing outbound at an early-stage startup.

 - Experience selling technical products or AI software.

 - Familiarity with tools like HubSpot, Salesforce, Apollo, or Outreach.

 


IF YOU’RE EXCITED TO HELP BUILD THE FOUNDATION OF A HIGH-VELOCITY OUTBOUND MOTION AT AN EARLY-STAGE AI STARTUP, WE’D LOVE TO CHAT.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state of the art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualifications. We’re growing revenue like crazy and looking for an Account Executive to help accelerate our sales motion and close high-impact deals.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.

 


THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at U Chicago and led software at PEAK6. We have grown into a strong team of 8 and are continuing to scale quickly




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for an Account Executive to help us turn strong customer demand into a repeatable sales motion. You will own deals end to end: prospecting into target accounts, running discovery, leading demos, navigating multi-stakeholder sales cycles, negotiating, and closing new business.

This is not a polished enterprise sales org where every playbook already exists. You will work closely with the CEO, our sales team, and engineering to figure out what works, tighten our pitch, learn from customers, and help build the early sales muscle at Simple.

The best fit for this role is someone who is highly competitive, comfortable creating their own pipeline, strong in front of customers, and excited to sell a technical AI product that can directly drive revenue for businesses.

 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - 2–6 years of experience in B2B SaaS sales, ideally closing mid-market or enterprise deals.

 - A track record of hitting or exceeding quota.

 - Strong discovery, presentation, and negotiation skills.

 - Ability to translate technical products into clear, compelling business value.

 - High ownership mindset and comfort operating in a fast-paced, ambiguous startup environment.

 - Excellent communication skills and a genuine interest in working with customers.

 - Curiosity and enthusiasm for AI and its impact on business operations.

 


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience selling to leaders of contact centers

 - Experience as an AE at an early-stage startup (Seed → Series B).

 - Experience with multi-stakeholder sales cycles and navigating complex organizations.

 


IF YOU’RE EXCITED TO CLOSE HIGH-IMPACT DEALS, SHAPE OUR GTM MOTION, AND JOIN AN EARLY-STAGE AI STARTUP WITH MASSIVE MOMENTUM, WE’D LOVE TO CHAT.

source_jobs.title: Founding Growth Marketer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SIMPLE

Simple AI http://usesimple.ai is building state of the art voice AI agents for enterprise. Our realistic agents help iconic businesses like Doordash, xAI, and Omaha Steaks handle all kinds of phone operations, from customer support to order intake to lead qualifications. We are growing revenue like crazy and looking to hire a couple founding software engineers to help us stay afloat of current customer demand and also build out systems for the future. We are very excited about the potential for AI to change the world, and work out of our SF based office.

Simple AI raised $14M from world-class investors and operators like Y Combinator, First Harmonic, Massive Tech Ventures, Michael Seibel, Jared Friedman, Alexandr Wang, Matt Van Horn, Suhail Doshi, and Scott Wu.

 


THE TEAM

The founders (Catheryn https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherynli/ and Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zach-kamran/) met while running software teams at YC, where they shipped tons of new products for YC founders, including YC’s co-founder matching site. Cat previously worked at Instagram and Facebook and earned degrees in math and computer science at MIT. Zach previously studied computer science and statistics at U Chicago and led software at PEAK6.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Growth Marketer to own the editorial direction, customer storytelling, and narrative engine for Simple AI. This person will turn customer conversations, sales calls, founder ideas, product launches, and technical complexity into clear, credible content for enterprise buyers.

You will own customer stories from intake through publication: identifying the strongest use cases, interviewing customers and internal teams, shaping the narrative, writing the draft, coordinating review, and turning the story into assets the GTM team can use across sales conversations, campaigns, events, and the website.

This is a hands-on writing and editorial role. You should have strong taste, sharp judgment, and the ability to translate complex enterprise AI deployments into narratives that resonate with executives, operators, and technical stakeholders.

 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary & meaningful equity

 - Employee-friendly equity terms

 - An office located in SF

 - Health, dental & vision insurance

 - Free lunch & dinner at the office

 - Commute Assistance

 - Regular team events & offsites
   
    


WHAT YOU'LL NEED

 - Have experience in content marketing, customer marketing, product marketing, editorial, or a content-heavy startup marketing role.

 - Are an exceptional writer and editor with a portfolio of crisp B2B, technical, or enterprise content.

 - Can synthesize messy inputs from customers, founders, sales calls, and technical teams into simple, compelling narratives.

 - Have strong judgment for what makes a customer story credible, differentiated, and useful to a buyer.

 - Are comfortable interviewing executives, operators, and technical stakeholders.

 - Care about both storytelling and business impact: content should help create trust, accelerate sales, and make the category easier to understand.

 - Can independently drive multiple workstreams from blank page to published asset.
   
    


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience with AI, contact center, customer support, sales automation, enterprise workflow, or technical SaaS products.

 - Experience with customer story programs, case studies, executive content, launch content, or founder-led content.

 - Experience partnering directly with sales teams and turning customer proof into sales assets.

 - Experience with video, interview prep, scripts, social content, or events.

 


IF YOU'RE EXCITED TO BUILD THE MARKETING CONTENT BEHIND A FAST-GROWING AI STARTUP, WE'D LOVE TO CHAT.

notes: AI-focused startup with strong engineering core, growing revenue rapidly
